title: Blackspur - Clip-On Frame Bike Pump - Black
features: Suitable for most inflatable balls & bicycle tyres, this sturdy plastic pump can be attached to your bicycle frame in case of emergencies.
It is also suitable for use with a presta valve.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: Product Description Blackspur bicycle pump suitable for most inflatable balls and bicycle tyres, this sturdy plastic pump can be attached to your bicycle frame in case of emergencies. Packed in carded. Measures 22mm by 220mm length. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Pump
